titleStmt.title: SII 10.151: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 151. (A.R. No. 443 of 1915.) ON A NĀGA PILLAR SET UP IN A STREET IN TIMMAPURAM, NARASARAOPETA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1083.

summary.p: States that Saraṇaya, brother of Kāmidēvi, a wife (?) of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḍa Gōṅkarāju established the image of Gōkēśvara in Jēvaramu and made a gift of land and an oil-mill to that temple and also of land to Brahmins.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrījayalakṣmīrāmaḥ paramaṇḍali
kānvayābjadainyahimadhāmaḥ vaibha
va vijitamahēṁdrō jayati kulōttu
ṁgga cōḍagoṁkanarēṁdraḥ . Iṭṭi śrī goṁkarāju
la kiṣṭa bhrityu ṇḍaina saraṇaya nāmāvali yeṭṭide
śrīvilasadvilāsajitajiṣṇu nicē nahisīma
kriṣṇucē . dēvasamānucēta naradēvaśikhāmaṇicē
ta dhānyavāṭīvaravrittiśāsanapaṭīyaśi nāṁ dagi
mēlunāyakaśrīvibhuṁ ḍoppeṁ bōtaya vaśīkritasa
jjanalōkuṁ ḍaibhuvini . 1 jitakāśi dūbavāḍaku
ṁ bati vōtayanāyakunaku bhāvajarājyānvita
lakṣmi yudaya mayyenu sutanuśrīvijitaraṁbha
sokkama dharaṇini . 2 mitaguṇaśīla rūpamula mēna
ka nū¨rvvaśi raṁbhaṁ bōli saṁstuti keṟavaṭṭa mai velayu
sokkama śīlamunaṁddu mānavīvitati nadhaḥkariṁci su
kavidvijabāndhavavaṁdi briṁddasammata vipulā¨rtthadānama
himaṁ brabha dālicina dhanya veṁppunanu . 3 dhara sa
nadavrōli paṇḍīśvara dēvara na¨rttakiya driva
¨rggaphalaśrīkara sokkama māhēśvaraparivā
rastrīlalōnaṁ brantutiṁ danarenu [. 4*] surava
nitāvilāsa yagu sōkkama kudbhava mai
ri dēvatāvaramuna vairivīrabhaṭa vaṁśavi
rāmuṇḍu gāmuṇḍunu mahi naranuta
śau¨ryyamū¨rtti saranaṇḍunu goṁkamahīśu
dēvi yai paragina lakṣmidēvi yanaṁ brastu
ti kekkina kāmidēviyunu . 5 naranuta
rājakalāgamaguruṇḍu gulōttuṁgga
cōḍagoṁkkadharitrīśvaruṁ ḍīśvarāṁśa
maguṭaṁ baragina śrīkāmidēvi pā¨rvva
tiṁ bōlunu . 6 kāmāṁbikānijāgra
juṁ gāmani vīrabhaṭa varaśikhāmaṇi
budhacintāmaṇi nanvayavanajanabhō
maṇi va[¨rnniṁ]ppaṁ dagu nabhōmaṇi tējunu
. 7 Ani gaṁjeṟvulakōṭanu gaṇapati sainya
ṁbu noḍicinu goṁkamahīmanaśiju
mecciṁcci nurāṁgganalakuṁ gāmu ṇḍai sa
niye gāmuṇḍu mahimanu . 8 vīruṇḍu sa
ranaya cōḍimahirājēṁdruṇḍumeccaṁ
ṟuriyaniniśūrāriṁ jaṁdavarāyani vāri
dhi sora negici vairiva¨rggamuṁ jaṁppenu . 9
saraṇayaśauriyavaṁ dripanaya
guruṇḍu gulōttuṁggacōḍagoṁkadharitrī
śvaruṇḍunu[la ?]mecci yicceṁ baragina jēva
ramu goṇḍapaḍumaṭilōnanu . 10
paragu śakābdamulu jagatkariviyadi
ṁdumiti nonaraṁga nimmahi visphura
duttarāyanaṁbu giripaścimajēvaramu
naṁ gīrtanaṁ danarenu (or n ) [. 11*]

varagoṁkīśvaranāmadhēyamuna
sa¨rvvajñuṁ bratiṣṭhiṁci susthirata nnityanivēdya
bhūsurabhujaddīpā¨rttha mai yoppaṁgā śaraṇa ṇḍi
[cce ]ṁ daṭākamunu dharayuṁ śaśvatai(ttai)layeṁtraṁbu
nānphuradiṁdudyudiśāṁbarāmarakubhri
dbhūtārakaṁ baicanan . 12 śrīrāma rāma ṁdri [ nni Or nṛ� ]
vaśēkharaviṣṇumū¨rtti vīrāgraganya(ṇya) bhujavikra
mapā¨rtthivēṁdra mārāriyaṁghriyugamāsasarāja
haṁśa kārunya(ṇya) dānasahakāramahīja rājā . 13 Adripa
ścimabhūmiyaṁdu prasiddha mai jīvapōṣana sēyu jē
varaṁbu bhaṁḍanabhīmuṁḍibaḍigolā¨rjunu mrōla
ṁ bekku gayyamulaṁdu vērukoninaṁ ba
ti mecci śāsanabaddhaṁbu sēyuḍu naṁdu gōkīśvaradē
vara nilipi varakāminī lakṣmīvallabhu vallabhi
gāmidēvula pēraṁ gaṭṭi ceṟuvu rudrunaku nicci dha
¨rmābhivriddhigāṁga dīpava¨rttiki gānuvu driḍhamu sēsi
bhūnurōttamavarulaku bhūmi dāna micci na
lliṁḍlu nilipi tā nintavaṭṭu [.] 14 sōdarīpatula dānaṁbu śā
svatamugā dha¨rmamu nanuva¨rtti yai dha¨rmmamū
¨rtti velalasinila sēsanamu sēsi tōḍa nili
pi sokkamasaraṇaya negaḍeṁgī¨rtti . 15
paramaparuṁ ḍaina goṁkīsvaruniṁ bratiṣṭiṁcci
dha¨rmaparuṁ ḍai lakṣmīvaruṁ ḍai sokkamasara
ṇaya dhara dānamu bhūsuralaku dattamu sēsenu . 16
parimala baragina paṁcama
hāśabdapraṇavaṁbulatōṁ garaṁ moppu dhū
paghaṁṭeyu saranaya goṁkīśvaruniki
paḷyamu yiccenu . 17 yavaḍiladūba
vāḍaṁ gramamuna paṇḍīsvaramunaṁ gaḍu
dhanyamugā namaraṁ goṁkīsvaruniki vimalaṁ ba
gu dīpava¨rtti velayaṁgaṁ beṭṭenu . 18 guḍiyu
nu jeṟuvunu vanamunu naḍarina nallilcuṁ gri
tiyu naḍapennidhiyunuṁ goḍuku lanu
saptasantati noḍaṁgūḍaṁga nilipi sara
naṁ do(ḍo ?)ppeṁ gī¨rttini . 19 svasti śakābdamulu 1083 gu
nēṁṭṭi yuttarāyanasaṁkrāṁttinimittamuna jēva
ramuna saraṇaya śrīgoṁkarājunakuṁ gāmidēvikiṁ dha
mmā¨rtthamugaṁ beṭṭina dha¨rmmuvulu goṁkēśvaradēvara ceṟvu
[¨rvvu] nīrinēla ma¨rttulu 20 velivolamuna nivēdyamu kha 1 ga
ḍḍuvamaḍi kha 1 mallikā¨rjjunadēvara gaḍḍuva maḍi
kha 1 yīdēvaralaku pūjāri vēmatammaḍi . mūlasthā
nadēvaraku gaḍḍuva maḍi kha 1 dīni pūjāri cupana .
nārāyaṇadēvaraku nivēdyamu kha 1 gaḍḍuva ma
ḍi kha 1 dīni pūjāri pōte . dēvara śaṁkuvānki kha 1
ciṭṭikuṁdduṟukēśavabhaṭlu kha 3 I dēvapratiṣṭalaku lagna
mu seppina sūriyabhaṭlu kha 3 vīnika brahmasamudramu venuka nīripa
ripolamu ma¨rttulu 2 Appanabhaṭlu kha 2 prōlebhaṭlu kha 1 .
viddarājuyāytanabhaṭlu kha 2 mādhavabhaṭlu kha 1 jillebhaṭlu kha 1
kēśavabhaṭlu na 10 Allebhaṭlu na 10 vāmanabhaṭlu kha 2
peddebhaṭlu kha 1 svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣiṁ
varuṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . yidha¨rmmuvu se
ḍisinavāru vāṇarāśi vraccinavāru pedakoḍaku vadhiṁccināru
Digital edition of SII 10.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
